methodology: Glucose Goddess — structure meals to blunt blood-glucose spikes: eat vegetables/fibre first, keep breakfast savoury and protein-rich, add a little vinegar or fat to carbs, and move gently after eating.
prescribed_foods: vegetables/fibre first at each meal (Glucose Goddess)
lean proteins: chicken, fish, turkey, pork loin, beef
whole grains and sourdough over refined starches
nutritionist_notes: Portion/exchange-based plan following the Glucose Goddess approach. Daily calorie and macro figures are estimated from a mid-range choice in each meal exchange; the food categories, portions and allowed alternatives are the authority. 500 ml of water with each of the four meals (~2 L/day). Original document in Spanish (clinic: Alvear 1).
